heroDescription: We help brands, enterprises, and game studios build custom games and interactive apps, from branded minigames to full mobile titles delivered by a studio trusted by AirAsia and Khazanah Nasional.
aboutP1: Hidden Chest Studios is a Malaysian game development studio delivering award-calibre interactive experiences across PC, mobile, and bespoke brand installations. Founded in 2020, we operate at the intersection of game design, technology, and storytelling.
aboutP2: We've shipped interactive projects for AirAsia and Khazanah Nasional, and our own flagship IP Midwest 90: Rapid City! Which is going to be in early access on Steam. Every project is managed directly by a co-founder. No middlemen, no outsourcing the craft.
trustedByDesc: We've partnered with some of Malaysia's most recognisable brands and institutions. If you want to engage your audience through games and interactive experiences, let's talk.
press2Quote: "Hidden Chest Studios building Malaysia's gaming future"
press4Quote: Digital News Asia feature on local indie studios
press5Quote: Radio segment on Malaysia's creative tech industry
svc1Desc: Programming, 2D/3D art and animation support for teams that need extra hands. We slot into your pipeline at any stage, from prototyping to production.
svc2Desc: Gamified brand activations, AR/VR installations and custom apps that connect your audience on an emotional level.
svc3Desc: Game-grade technology applied to software products. iOS, Android and web apps delivered end-to-end.
flagshipDescription: A tycoon survival simulator set in a 1990s American midwest town. Free alpha available now.
flagshipFeatureDesc: Tycoon survival simulator. Build a city in the American Midwest during the 1990s. Manage resources, survive harsh winters, and grow your settlement into a thriving community. Wishlist on Steam.
communityP1: We're building a community to follow development of Midwest 90: Rapid City, participate in playtests, and be part of the Hidden Chest story.
communityP2: Get early alpha access, behind-the-scenes updates, and direct lines to the team.
contactDescription: Have a game idea, consultation, interactive installation, or mobile app? Drop us a line and let's bring it to life!
